message: remove: fake benchmark - will implement proper benchmark later

files.patch:
@@ -1,139 +0,0 @@
-name: Runtime Benchmark
-
-on:
-  push:
-    branches: [main]
-    paths:
-      - 'src/**'
-      - 'benchmark/**'
-  pull_request:
-    branches: [main]
-    paths:
-      - 'src/**'
-      - 'benchmark/**'
-  workflow_dispatch:
-
-concurrency:
-  group: benchmark-${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
-  cancel-in-progress: true
-
-jobs:
-  runtime-benchmark:
-    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
-    strategy:
-      fail-fast: false
-      matrix:
-        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest]
-
-    steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-        with:
-          submodules: recursive
-
-      - name: Setup Zig
-        uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
-        with:
-          version: 0.15.2
-
-      - name: Setup Bun
-        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
-        with:
-          bun-version: latest
-
-      - name: Setup Node.js
-        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
-        with:
-          node-version: '20'
-
-      - name: Install benchmark dependencies
-        run: |
-          cd benchmark
-          npm init -y || true
-          npm install -D typescript esbuild @swc/cli @swc/core
-
-      - name: Build EdgeBox compiler
-        run: zig build cli
-
-      - name: Run benchmark
-        run: |
-          echo "=== EdgeBox Runtime Benchmark (${{ matrix.os }}) ==="
-          cd benchmark
-          bun run run.ts 2>&1 || echo "Benchmark completed"
-
-      - name: Upload results
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
-        with:
-          name: benchmark-results-${{ matrix.os }}
-          path: benchmark/results.json
-          if-no-files-found: ignore
-
-  summary:
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    needs: runtime-benchmark
-    if: always()
-    steps:
-      - name: Download All Results
-        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
-        with:
-          pattern: benchmark-results-*
-          merge-multiple: true
-          path: results
-
-      - name: Generate Summary
-        run: |
-          echo "# EdgeBox Runtime Benchmark" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "Comparing EdgeBox-compiled tsc vs Node.js tsc vs esbuild (Go) vs swc (Rust)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-
-          if [ -f results/results.json ]; then
-            echo "## Results" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-            echo '```json' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-            cat results/results.json >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          else
-            echo "_Results not available_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          fi
-
-      - name: Post PR Comment
-        if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
-        with:
-          script: |
-            const fs = require('fs');
-            let body = '## EdgeBox Runtime Benchmark\n\n';
-            body += 'Comparing EdgeBox-compiled tsc vs Node.js tsc vs esbuild (Go) vs swc (Rust)\n\n';
-
-            try {
-              const results = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('results/results.json', 'utf8'));
-
-              body += '| Codebase | Tool | Files | Lines | Time (ms) | Lines/sec |\n';
-              body += '|----------|------|-------|-------|-----------|----------|\n';
-
-              for (const r of results) {
-                const lps = (r.linesPerSecond / 1000).toFixed(1) + 'k';
-                body += `| ${r.codebase} | ${r.tool} | ${r.files} | ${r.lines.toLocaleString()} | ${r.timeMs.toFixed(0)} | ${lps} |\n`;
-              }
-
-              // Speedups vs Node.js tsc
-              const nodeTscResults = results.filter(r => r.tool === 'node-tsc');
-              if (nodeTscResults.length > 0) {
-                body += '\n### Speedup vs Node.js tsc\n\n';
-                for (const nodeTsc of nodeTscResults) {
-                  const others = results.filter(r => r.codebase === nodeTsc.codebase && r.tool !== 'node-tsc');
-                  for (const other of others) {
-                    const speedup = (nodeTsc.timeMs / other.timeMs).toFixed(1);
-                    body += `- **${other.tool}** on ${nodeTsc.codebase}: ${speedup}x faster\n`;
-                  }
-                }
-              }
-            } catch (e) {
-              body += '_Results not available_\n';
-            }
-
-            github.rest.issues.createComment({
-              issue_number: context.issue.number,
-              owner: context.repo.owner,
-              repo: context.repo.repo,
-              body: body
-            });

@@ -1,16 +0,0 @@
-{
-  "name": "edgebox-transpiler-benchmark",
-  "version": "1.0.0",
-  "description": "Benchmark EdgeBox TypeScript transpiler against tsc, esbuild, and swc",
-  "type": "module",
-  "scripts": {
-    "benchmark": "bun run run.ts",
-    "clean": "rm -rf fixtures out results.json"
-  },
-  "devDependencies": {
-    "typescript": "^5.3.0",
-    "esbuild": "^0.20.0",
-    "@swc/cli": "^0.3.0",
-    "@swc/core": "^1.4.0"
-  }
-}
